info.name: SEKAR API
info.description:
SEKAR (Sistem Evaluasi Kerja Satgas RTH) - Complete API Collection

## Overview

> **Phase 2D Update (March 2026):** Added 7 new monitoring/boundary endpoints, renamed `/live-workers` to `/live-users`, added four-status tracking model.

- **Total Endpoints:** 118
- **Authentication:** JWT Bearer Token (15-min access + 7-day refresh)
- **Base URL:** http://localhost:3000/api/v1
- **Tests:** 922 passing (54 test suites, 87.93% coverage)

## Test Users (Phase 2C - 8 roles)
- admin / admin123 (Superadmin)
- admin_system1 / password123 (Admin System)
- admin_data1 / password123 (Admin Data)
- korlap1 / korlap123 (Korlap)
- satgas1,2,3 / satgas123 (Satgas)
- linmas1,2 / satgas123 (Linmas)
- kepala_rayon_selatan / password123 (Kepala Rayon)
- top_management1 / password123 (Top Management)

## Collection Structure

### Phase 1 MVP
- 00-11: Core endpoints (auth, users, areas, shifts, activities, location, supervisor)

### Phase 2A - Backend Foundation
- 12-17: Special Day Overrides, Rayons, Shift Definitions, Activity Types, Area Staff, Schedules

### Phase 2B - Backend Core Features
- 18. Tasks (12 endpoints)
- 19. Notifications (7 endpoints)
- 20. Monitoring (4 endpoints)
- 21. KMZ Import (3 endpoints)

### Phase 2C - Client Feedback
- 22. Overtime (6 endpoints)

## Phase 2C Terminology Changes
- /aktivitas → /activities (Indonesian → English)
- /worker-schedules → /schedules (simplified)
- worker_id → user_id (generalized)
- Reports → Activities (entity rename)
- WorkerSchedule → Schedule (entity rename)
- worker/supervisor roles → satgas/korlap (Indonesian official titles)

## Status
- ✅ Phase 1 MVP Complete
- ✅ Phase 2A Backend Foundation Complete
- ✅ Phase 2B Backend Core Features Complete
- ✅ Phase 2C Terminology Cleanup Complete

request.description:
Get the GeoJSON boundary polygon for an area.

Returns `boundary` (GeoJSON Polygon/MultiPolygon), `center` (lat/lng), `area_sq_meters`, `coverage_percentage`.

**Phase 2D endpoint.**
**Roles:** admin_system, superadmin

Create or replace the boundary polygon for an area.

Accepts GeoJSON Polygon or MultiPolygon in the `boundary` field. Validated with GeoJSON validator utility (min 4 coordinates, valid winding order).

**Phase 2D endpoint.**
**Roles:** admin_system, superadmin

⚠️ Breaking Change (Feb 15, 2026): Response field names changed:
- total_workers_assigned → total_users_assigned
- workers_online → users_online
- workers_offline → users_offline
- workers: WorkerStatusDto[] → users: UserStatusDto[]

Get real-time user positions and status.

**Phase 2D:** Renamed from `/live-workers`. Response now includes `status` (TrackingStatus), `is_within_area`, `shift_name`, `shift_definition_id`, `accuracy`, `phone`. Totals split into `total_active`, `total_inactive`, `total_outside_area`, `total_missing`, `total_offline`.

**Roles:** korlap, kepala_rayon, top_management, admin_system, superadmin

query.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (defaults to today)

request.description:
Get GPS location history trail for a specific user on a given date.

Returns an array of location points with `latitude`, `longitude`, `accuracy`, `recorded_at`, `is_within_area`, plus trail analytics: `total_distance_km`, `total_points`, `time_inside_area_minutes`, `time_outside_area_minutes`.

**Roles:** korlap, kepala_rayon, top_management, admin_system, superadmin

Get a complete day summary for a specific user.

Returns: `user` info, `shift` (current/latest with clock_in/out times, shift_definition name), `last_location`, `today_activities` (array), `today_tasks` (array), `whatsapp_links` ({ chat, call }).

**Roles:** korlap, kepala_rayon, top_management, admin_system, superadmin

Get aggregated staffing status breakdown by rayon and area.

Returns areas grouped by rayon, each with `roles`: array of `RoleStaffingDto` containing `role`, `required`, `active`, `inactive`, `outside_area`, `missing`, `offline`.

**Roles:** korlap, kepala_rayon, top_management, admin_system, superadmin

Get all monitoring configuration entries.

Returns array of config items with keys: `status_thresholds`, `geofencing`, `map_defaults`, `alerts`, `location_ping`. Each has `key`, `value` (JSON), `description`, `updated_at`.

**Roles:** admin_system, superadmin

Update a monitoring configuration value. Key must be one of: `status_thresholds`, `geofencing`, `map_defaults`, `alerts`, `location_ping`.

The `value` object is validated with Zod schemas per key. Updating `status_thresholds` or `geofencing` invalidates the monitoring cache.

**Roles:** admin_system, superadmin
